creator: rws@procopia.com
text:
dbXML is a Java implementation of a Native XML Database it Requires JDK1.3

This is an updated version of my previous non-committed port
and completely supercedes ports/31424

Improvements include, reorganized pkg-plist, a new start up script 'dbxmlctl', and the port now runs as an unpriviledged user
(similar to apache). Many of the improvements are based on the orion port.

Fix: 

Here is a link to shar archive

http://learning.procopia.com/ports/dbxml.shar

I can supply various other forms if required
